name: Option premium currency
description: For options transactions (including swaptions transactions), this data element reports the currency of the option premium.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Contract type is reported as OPTN or SWPT.
Required if Option amount is reported.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
valueRules: For an option transaction for which no option premium is paid, Option premium currency is reported as either Notional currency—Leg 1 or Notional currency—Leg 2.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
